name: Pembrey Country Park & Forest
dog_lead_policy: Off-lead in forest, on lead near road
highlights: 8-mile sweep of Cefn Sidan beach backed by one of Wales's biggest coastal pine forests.
points_of_interest: Cefn Sidan Blue Flag beach; WWII airfield ruins; dry ski slope
viewpoints: Dune crest over Carmarthen Bay; Gower opposite
parking_start: Pembrey Country Park car park (pay & display)
hazards_notes: Sands can be soft at high tide; midges in wooded sections
